title: helipterum clementii
intro: Helipterum clementii, also known as the Swan River daisy, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies.
